description:
## The change

In `src/ir_codegen.rs:1865-1873`, today:

```rust
let pre_types = type_module(&working);
rewrite_vec_kinds(&mut working, &pre_types)?;
let mid_types = type_module(&working);                // ‚Üê delete
rewrite_known_target_closures(&mut working, &mid_types);
```

After:

```rust
let pre_types = type_module(&working);
rewrite_vec_kinds(&mut working, &pre_types)?;
rewrite_known_target_closures(&mut working, &pre_types);
```

The third `type_module` call at line 1891 stays ‚Äî it sees the
post-inline / post-fuse / post-reduce IR and is genuinely a
different computation.

## Why this is correct

The code comment at `ir_codegen.rs:1857-1864` already documents the
orthogonality:

> rewrite_vec_kinds reads any_key_specs/ft.vars to find element
> types of MakeVec stmts. rewrite_known_target_closures reads
> specs/ft.fn_constants to find constant-closure CallClosure
> targets. The two reads are orthogonal (element types vs.
> fn_constants) and their writes are orthogonal (VecKindIr
> mutations vs. CallClosure‚ÜíCall rewrites). A single type_module
> call CAN serve both ‚Äî merging calls 1+2 would reduce the
> pipeline count from 3 to 2.

The author observed the invariant and stopped at "left as a future
simplification." This ticket is that simplification.

Why the writes really are orthogonal: `rewrite_vec_kinds` mutates
`Prim::MakeVec` kind tags (I64‚ÜíF64). `fn_constants` tracks Vars
bound to `Prim::Const(Value::Fn)` and `Prim::MakeClosure` ‚Äî neither
prim type is touched. So `pre_types.fn_constants ==
mid_types.fn_constants`, identically, on every module.

## Removals

- The `let mid_types = type_module(&working);` line.
- The `type_module_called_exactly_three_times_in_pipeline` test
  in `src/ir_codegen_tests.rs:1288`. Replace with
  `type_module_called_exactly_twice_in_pipeline` asserting `== 2`.
  No "‚â§ 3" softening ‚Äî the count is now a fixed invariant of the
  pipeline shape.

## Acceptance

- One typer call removed from the pipeline.
- Updated test asserts exactly 2 calls.
- `ast_eval` end-to-end compile drops by ~170 ms.
- Every fixture passes three-path parity.

## Independent of

TYP.1 and TYP.3.
title: fz-TYP.2: Delete redundant type_module call in codegen pipeline
